examples: He wore rimless glasses and sported a neat grey moustache, which looked very impressive.
He had beautiful skin, with rosy cheeks, blue eyes, rimless round bifocal spectacles, resting on the tip of his nose.
Painter is six feet three and forty-two, with dark hair, rimless eyeglasses, and a deep voice.
His lower lip jutted slightly, and he stared through rimless glasses with undisguised contempt at his former friend.
Laith, an engineer with rimless eyeglasses, was younger and taller, and given to bursts of enthusiasm and displeasure.
